description: 雙流程候選內容生成框架（API + Agent + QA + Review Bundle）

tasks.desc: Shared schema v1: Define canonical candidate schema used by API/Agent/review station.
Generation brief schema v1: Define batch inputs (level/unit/type/count/variants/style/cost).
Batch directory convention + manifests: Standardize batch folder structure and output filenames.
API flow prompt templates: lesson / grammar_note / dictionary_pack / path_node.
API batch runner MVP: Generate candidate_packs.api.raw.json from generation_brief (provider-agnostic).
API raw normalize adapter: Convert raw API output into canonical candidate schema.
QA rules + qa_report.json: required fields, duplicate similarity, A1 guard, unit fit, zh-summary checks.
Review-ready bundle exporter: Build review_ready_bundle.json importable by Content Review Station.
Agent gap analysis spec + output schema (gap_report.json, Chinese-first summary).
Agent generation spec: Candidate generation with mandatory Chinese review fields and placement rationale.
Agent self-review spec: language quality, novelty, teachability, production cost, risk flags, recommendation.
Agent raw normalize adapter: Convert agent outputs to canonical candidate schema.
Accepted adapter (catalog): Transform accepted_candidates.json into catalog_draft.json.
Accepted adapter (backlog): Transform accepted_candidates.json into backlog_seed.json.
End-to-end dry run: Run one sample batch through generate -> normalize -> QA -> review import -> accepted adapters.
Multilingual curriculum architecture blueprint: target-language core + learner-locale pedagogy overlays (zh-TW first), with lllo directory conventions.
Curriculum learning-loop design: immersive input + spaced review + structured sentence-pattern/grammar tracks, and candidate taxonomy alignment.
Schema/brief extensions for multilingual pedagogy, review scheduling metadata, and adapter-safe unit/frontend contract fields (sequencing/resource_links/adapter_hints).
Single-unit sequencing mockup + frontend transfer plan: A1-U04 experience mock and adapter-first migration notes for existing Flutter frontend.
Detailed frontend transfer test plan (Gemini parallel streams): adapter/renderer/interaction/integration tests for A1-U04 mockup.
Agent work-order templates for HTML mockup modularization/scale-out: assignment prompts, delivery report template, and acceptance checklist.
HTML mockup modularization (viewer shell + state/storage/TTS + renderer modules) with behavior parity to current A1-U04 playable mockup.
Renderer registry contract (content_form/output_mode) + fallback strategy + adapter-safe docs for future Flutter alignment.
Unit blueprint scaffolding + authoring templates: generate new unit fixture skeletons and document required fields/checklists.
Fixture QA/lint hardening + unified mockup-check command: multi-fixture validation, contract drift checks, mixed-script guards.
Multi-unit HTML viewer shell: fixture index + unit selector + per-unit localStorage namespace isolation for PM trial scale-out.
Educational flow optimization review + unit_blueprint v0.x field proposal (comprehension checks, repair practice, retrieval targets, transfer tasks).
